hero.title: Support Our Work
hero.subtitle: Every contribution helps us reach more communities.

waysToGiveSection.label: Ways to Give
waysToGiveSection.title: Choose How You'd Like to Donate
waysToGiveSection.subtitle: Your support directly funds our education, health, and community programs.
waysToGiveSection.helpText: Have questions about donating, or want a receipt for your contribution? Contact us — we're happy to help.

otherWaysSection.label: Prefer Another Way?
otherWaysSection.title: There Are Many Ways to Support Us
otherWaysSection.subtitle: Financial giving is just one option — volunteering and partnerships make a difference too.
